_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutation expands an EGFR-dependent peripheral nerve progenitor that confers neurofibroma tumorigenic potential.

_contextSnippet: Spheres from all genotypes contained cells that coexpressed EGFR and P75. All spheres analyzed contained EGFR+;P75+ cells (n = 8 spheres from each of three embryos per genotype)
details: Successfully detected P75 expression co-localized with EGFR in spheres from all genotypes, with all spheres containing EGFR+;P75+ cells
